items.title: Athletics Slugger Brent Rooker Set for Season-Ending Left Knee Surgery
items.excerpt: Athletics designated hitter Brent Rooker will undergo surgery to repair a cartilage tear in his left knee and miss the remainder of the season.

items.title: Christian Pulisic Says Folarin Balogun 'Didn’t Deserve The Red Card' In World Cup Win
items.excerpt: Christian Pulisic praised the United States' team effort after they overcame a second-half red card to beat Bosnia and Herzegovina 2-0.
